item.name: Goldfin Cavalli
item.description:
This domineering wavekin possesses powerful, gold-tinged fins.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: The golden fins of this saltwater fish are often likened to the honed tip of a halberd. Seen as protectors of the capital's harbor, these wavekin are venerated by Tuliyollan sailors.
